Banana Tape Wall

A modern masterpiece.



This Banana Was Duct-
Taped to a Wall. It Sold
for $120,000.



That’s about 800 Solana.


BUY & CLAIM

CLEAR GLITCH

CONNECT WALLET

Get started by downloading Phantom or your preferred wallet from the
app store or Google Play for free. For desktop users, install the
Phantom extension from the Chrome Web Store.

GRAB A BUNDLE OF SOLANA

Ensure you have SOL in your wallet to exchange for $BTW. If you don't have any, you
can purchase SOL directly within the Phantom app, transfer from another wallet, or buy
it on a different exchange and send it to your wallet.

NAVIGATE TO RAYDIUM


Access Raydium. Open Raydium in your Chrome browser or within the Phantom app browser. Connect your
wallet. Enter the $BTW token address in Raydium, select $BTW, and confirm. When Phantom asks for a wallet
signature, approve it.

EXCHANGE FOR $BTW

Trade SOL for $BTW. With zero taxes, you don't need to worry about setting a specific slippage for the
transaction.

LOAD UP YOUR WALLET

HOW TO BUY

MEMES

SOCIALS

TELEGRAM

TWITTER
